title: QUANTITY SURVEYOR
description:
• Evaluating of subcontractor’s progress claims, variation claim and recommend teaming with manager for the interim payment certificates until final account settlement
  • Client Progress Payment Claim Preparation
  • Analyzing the documents and letters related with contact administration & update logs
  • Ensuring cost control and project schedule is met
  • Preparing of tender documents and specifications for subcontractors
  • Preparing of subcontractor agreements, letter of award, work/purchase order, etc.
  • Quantity measurement and preparing of progress claim and variation order, EOT to the Client and Consultants
  • Coordination, supervision and monitoring progress of project works and progress of subcontractors work
  • Track / study changes to the design and/or construction work and find out / develop the VO proposals
  • Liaise with the external Claim consultant and relevant managers/ staff
  • Liaise with the Client / Consultant for QS and contract related issues
  • Other duties as assigned


Job Requirements

  • Diploma in Quantity Surveying / Civil Engineering or equivalent
  • Understanding of civil works
  • Familiar with MS Office, AutoCAD, etc.
  • Self-motivated and able to work with minimum supervision
  • At least 3 years’ working experience in quantity surveying

postedCompany.description:
Hyundai Engineering & Construction (Hyundai E&C) is the first Korean construction company to venture successfully through overseas expansion to Southeast Asia and Middle East. We are building a better world with creative ideas and passion and a better future through constant innovation and challenges. Being a global EPCM company, we will break away from the traditional construction-oriented business structure to offer total engineering solutions encompassing designing, engineering, and operations. By venturing into new markets overseas, and establishing an optimized management infrastructure, we will pursue the diversification of overseas projects and become a global EPCM company that leads the construction business worldwide.


Hyundai E&C aim to create unrivaled value by fostering talents who strive to be the best in uncharted territories. We also target to cultivate a people-centered corporate culture where the top priority is placed on our employees and customers. We establishes a free and horizontal culture that breaks away from the conventional corporate culture of rigid bureaucracy. By creating an open and diverse culture, all our members are carefully listen to and empathize with each other. We prioritize ‘people’ above all and create a better life, ultimately working to build a future in which all stakeholders can prosper and grow together.


Together, We Build Tomorrow
postedCompany.name: HYUNDAI ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION CO. LTD
